findings.title: FAST pipeline + forward strategy の挙動が未定義
findings.rationale: FAST pipeline は test-materialize を含まないため、bug-fix/new-feature の forward strategy job でも base OID が存在しない。gate が base OID を参照した際に runtime error か誤動作が起きる可能性がある。実装者は (a) gate を STANDARD pipeline のみに追加、(b) base OID 不在を strategy-deferred として扱う、のいずれかを選択する必要がある。

findings.title: Managed runtime での BiteEvidence gate 動作が未定義
findings.rationale: gate は隔離 worktree に base/candidate OID を checkout してテストを実行する必要があるが、managed runtime（Anthropic Managed Agents API）がこの worktree 操作をサポートするかどうか未記載。managed runtime での挙動（スキップ / strategy-deferred / エラー）を明示するか、managed runtime を適用外として宣言する必要がある。

findings.title: tamper 検知の frozen hash 取得元（events.jsonl lineage 構造）が未記載
findings.rationale: test-case-gen 境界で記録された frozen hash を events.jsonl から読み出す際の lineage レコード構造（{ type:'lineage', step:'test-case-gen', outputs:[{path, hash}] }）の参照方法が明示されていない。commit-orchestrator.ts:217-245 が暗黙の正本になるが、実装者が確認する必要がある。

observations.title: コードアサーション全件確認済み
observations.rationale: StepRun:172（OID フィールドなし）、captureHeadSha:local.ts:559、approvedAtCommit:reviewer-snapshot.ts:51、executor.ts:433 の finalizeStepArtifacts gate、commit-orchestrator.ts:217-245 の lineage 記録、test-materialize.ts の base OID コメント、type-config.ts の 5 型定義、commit-push.ts:36 の commitAndPush、すべて実コードで一致確認。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, and tasks.md under specrunner/changes/bite-evidence-forward/ on branch change/bite-evidence-forward-0802ded7.

Plan summary (R4 forward-strategy MVP):
- OID capture (D1): add StepRun.commitOid captured after finalizeStepArtifacts in runAgentStep; threaded through StepExecutionResult → projectSuccess → pushStepResult AND through StepAttemptRecord/stepRunToRecord/fold — required because the projection strips `steps` from state.json and rebuilds them by folding events.jsonl (resume-safety constraint). Base OID = latest test-materialize run, candidate OID = latest implementer run.
- BiteEvidence gate (D2): new `bite-evidence` CLI step inserted implementer→bite-evidence→verification in STANDARD_DESCRIPTOR only (fast pipeline untouched). Verdicts passed→verification, strategy-deferred→verification, failed/error→escalate.
- Isolated execution behind RuntimeStrategy ports (D3): listCommitChangedFiles + runTestsAtCommit (optional on port, required on RealRuntimeStrategy; managed → unavailable), keeping gate decision logic pure/testable.
- Strategy from request.type only (D4): forward = bug-fix/new-feature; non-forward + non-isolable runtimes defer.
- Fail-closed (D5): hollow test (base green), candidate red, tamper mismatch, or missing materialized tests → failed → escalate.
- Tamper (D6): frozen test-cases.md hash from test-case-gen lineage vs current digestArtifacts; mismatch fail-closed, absent→inconclusive (tooth still enforced).
- Branch-borne BiteEvidence (D7): top-level state.biteEvidence reflected via parseResult→StepCompletion→commitSuccess (pullRequest precedent) + bite-evidence-result.md.
- Materialized tests only (D8): base-commit changed files minus specrunner/changes & .specrunner.

tasks.md T-01..T-11 covers all 8 request acceptance criteria. Two open questions surfaced (scoped test-command resolution; biteEvidence accumulation vs replacement). No source edits performed — planning only.
